access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to view revenue reports. Please contact an administrator.

total_revenue.title: Total Booked Revenue
total_revenue.description: Total value of all confirmed bookings created in this period.

stay_revenue.title: Total Stay Revenue
stay_revenue.description: Revenue generated from stays occurring within the period.

pending_revenue.title: Pending Payments
pending_revenue.description: Total amount due from all unpaid or partially paid reservations.

total_bookings.title: Total Bookings
total_bookings.description: Number of confirmed bookings created in this period.

adr.title: Average Daily Rate (ADR)
adr.description: Average revenue earned per occupied room per day.

occupancy_rate.title: Occupancy Rate
occupancy_rate.description: Percentage of available rooms occupied in this period.

revpar.title: Revenue Per Available Room (RevPAR)
revpar.description: Average revenue generated per available room.

canceled_bookings.title: Canceled Bookings Value
canceled_bookings.description: Potential revenue lost from cancellations in this period.

chart.title: Revenue Over Time
chart.description: Track your total booked revenue for the selected period.
chart.empty_state: No revenue data available for the selected filters.

breakdown.room_type_description: Breakdown of total revenue by each room type.
breakdown.empty_state_room: No revenue data for any room type in this period.
breakdown.source_description: Breakdown of total revenue by how the booking was made.
breakdown.empty_state_source: No revenue data for any source in this period.
